programme.desc: Episode 106 of Showdown on the Unbeatables features the Stang water blaster versus Ultra Every Dry's water repellent coating; the Republic Lagun VGC 4428 smart drill versus HPA's super alloy; and the Harris Hawk versus the XFactory X6 remote controlled racecar.

programme.title: Don't Drive Here
programme.desc: New Delhi is home to breathtaking architecture, great food and the world's highest rate of traffic accidents!

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild Season 1
programme.desc: Survival expert Bear Grylls takes real people who inspire him into the wild. On the series premiere, Jennifer, a glamper mom of four - two of which have down syndrome - learns camping skills to impress her outdoor-loving family while Bear learns about her international quest that helped save lives.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild Season 1
programme.desc: Who says you can't do adventure without legs? Former recon marine and war hero Jonathon lost both of his legs in Afghanistan, but his wild spirit lifts him to new heights. He takes on the wilderness with survival expert Bear Grylls and challenges everything you think you know about disability.

programme.title: Don't Drive Here

programme.title: David Attenborough A Life on Earth
programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Mikey links up with astronaut Chris Hadfield in space, and a landing gear collapse sends the Buffalo crew scrambling.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: NHL players from the Ottawa Senators shoot pucks with Mikey and the Buffalo Airways team; and there's panic in the cockpit when DC-3 co-pilot David navigates a bad landing.

programme.title: River Walks
programme.desc: This multi award-winning documentary follows charismatic blind adventurer Amar Latif as he explorers one of Yorkshire's most stunning river valleys. programme.title: River Walks
programme.desc: Kirsten O'Brien sets off on a spectacular walk along on of Britain's wildest rivers. In this 15-mile hike along the River Tees near Barnard Castle, Kirsten explores the hidden history of Upper Teesdale. She meets some of extraordinary people who call its banks home and takes a daring wild swim in its white waters.

programme.title: Get Out Alive with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: The contestants are flown by helicopter to their next journey amidst a torrential downpour where they must cross a rope suspended one hundred feet above a deep gorge. The extreme height, and harsh camping conditions, test the teams.

programme.title: Billy Goes North

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: Mikey, police officer Axel Foley's friend, is murdered soon after he arrives in Detroit. When Axel takes up the investigation, he finds himself embroiled in the criminal world of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: She's Out Of My League
programme.desc: An average Joe meets the perfect woman, but his lack of confidence and the influence of his friends and family begin to pick away at the relationship.

programme.title: The Humanity Bureau
programme.desc: A dystopian thriller set in the year 2030 that sees the world in a permanent state of economic recession and facing serious environmental problems as a result of global warming.

Soon, Ray and Anjelika form a special bond, which threatens to jeopardize his mother's master plan to gain custody of Ray and Stella.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: A soldier and his brother escape into the woods when their city is invaded by North Korean paratroopers. After their father is killed, the brothers form a guerrilla group to fight back.

programme.title: I Am Wrath
programme.desc: After corrupt cops are unable to catch his wife's killers, Stanley, an unemployed man, teams up with an old friend to avenge her death.

programme.title: The Transporter Refueled
programme.desc: Frank Martin, a former mercenary, is hired by a woman and her accomplices to fulfil a contract. Soon, however, he must join forces with them to bring down a Russian crime lord.

programme.title: Tom & Jerry
programme.desc: Jerry, a mischievous mouse, takes refuge in a fancy hotel that is set to host a wedding. In order to get rid of him, one of the event planners hires Jerry's feline rival, Tom.

programme.title: Now You See Me
programme.desc: Four talented magicians are plucked from obscurity to become the Four Horsemen - a group of stage illusionists who soon attract the attention of the FBI.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible -- Fallout
programme.desc: After a crucial operation goes wrong, IMF Agent Ethan Hunt and his team must work together with a few allies to prevent a nuclear attack.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: To protect Earth from the Outworld, MMA fighter Cole Young sets out to find a group of fighters to defend the planet in a critical tournament.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul, the young scion of House Atreides, faces troubling visions of the future. Meanwhile, his family fights to gain control over Arrakis, the only source of the valuable spice melange.

programme.title: Piranha 3DD
